description: Legal deed in Aramaic. Dated: 133[.] Seleucid = 1018–29 CE. Shemuel b. Avraham ha-Levi ha-Sefaradi is appointing Mevorakh b. Yosef ha-Kohen. as his agent. Above this there is a different text block at the top, with a row of hollow circles separating the two blocks.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בארמית מהמאה ה-11. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
